title: mentha arvensis var. foliicoma
intro: Mentha arvensis var. foliicoma, also known as Japanese wild mint, is a variant of the common wild mint plant native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. foliicoma include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical application, with herbal preparations often involving the leaves and stems being dried, crushed, or infused in oils to extract its active compounds.
